name: Octodamus Market Intelligence
description: Autonomous market intelligence oracle for AI agents. 27 live data feeds, 11-signal consensus scoring. BUY/SELL/HOLD for BTC/ETH/SOL + tokenized NYSE stocks. Polymarket edges with EV, congressional trading signals, Grok crowd sentiment, macro regime (RISK-ON/OFF/NEUTRAL). Ed25519-signed responses. $0.01/call via x402 on Base or $29/yr.
